title: Gentle Hooves
description: Only players can trample crops - animals and mobs now tread lightly.
body:
# 🌾 Gentle Hooves

Prevents mobs from trampling farmland. Players can still trample crops normally.

## ✨ Features

- 🚫 Mobs and animals cannot trample farmland from normal movement
- 🎯 Falls from 3+ blocks still trample (realistic behavior)
- 👨‍🌾 Villagers can still harvest and replant crops
- 🎮 Players retain full trampling ability
- ⚡ Lightweight - minimal performance impact
- 🔧 No mods required

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack
2. Place in `.minecraft/saves/[YourWorld]/datapacks/`
3. Run `/reload` or restart your world
4. Verify with `/datapack list`

## 🔧 Technical Details

Works by resetting fall distance for non-player entities on farmland when falling less than 3 blocks, preventing trampling from normal movement while allowing realistic trampling from dangerous falls.

**Tested compatibility:** Falling blocks (sand, gravel, anvils etc), ender pearls, projectiles, and other entities work normally with no conflicts.

---

**Created by CRLSTRM**
